title: Iranian Missile Attack Leaves 3 Palestinians Dead in West Bank
summary_full: Several others were injured in the strike, which hit a caravan being used as a hair salon in the town of Beit Awwa, according to Palestinian officials.
summary_public: Several others were injured in the strike, which hit a caravan being used as a hair salon in the town of Beit Awwa, according to Palestinian officials.
